**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Senlong Electromechanical Co., Ltd. presents a definitive case of a defunct 1990s legacy manufacturer that has completely ceased physical production to become a dormant asset-leasing shell. The 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been completely eradicated. While officially tagged as a 'Manufacturer of Electrical Machinery', its physical metrics entirely contradict this: established in 1996 in Zhenjiang City, it reports exactly 1 insured employee for 2024. The presence of 'house leasing, warehousing, site and equipment leasing' at the end of its chaotic business scope reveals its true current status.
